---
title: "Charles Mozley"
---

## Charles Mozley

**Dates:** (1808-1883)

### Description

publisher

### Biography

A partner in the firm of John and Charles Mozley, he disliked publishing and retired in 1874 after his brother’s death, handing the business on to Walter Smith, remaining officially a partner until 1879

### Letters

- Letter from Decr 9th 1882

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
